help.body: Company knowledge DB referenced by Cue, AI writing, and Q note answer-finding. Classify by category (6 types) and scope (workspace/project/client). Narrower scope = higher precision.
help.cuePrefill: Tell me how categories and scopes in Q knowledge affect Cue's answers

empty.title: No knowledge yet
empty.desc: Add company materials so Cue can find answers from them.

modal.title: New knowledge
modal.bodyPh: Enter the body. After indexing it will be used by Cue.
modal.errProjectRequired: Project scope requires picking a project
modal.errClientRequired: Client scope requires picking a client
